seoTitle: Jardee vs Jarrahdale — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Jardee and Jarrahdale. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Jardee and Jarrahdale.
heading: Jardee vs Jarrahdale — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Jardee, Western Australia and Jarrahdale, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Jarrahdale has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Jardee (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Jardee or Jarrahdale safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Jardee has a flood risk score of 57/100, while Jarrahdale scores 47/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Jardee scores 48/100 for bushfire risk. Jarrahdale scores 28/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Jardee or Jarrahdale?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Jarrahdale has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
